title: Create a Custom Tool
lede: Custom Tools are reusable HTTP actions your AI agent can call in the middle of a conversation - to look something up, book a job, or send data to your own system.

steps.title: Open Custom Tools
steps.content:
1. In the left menu, go to Call Center → Custom Tools.
  2. You'll see the list of tools you've already built.
  3. Click Create (the + button) to open the Create Custom Tool drawer.

images.caption: The Custom Tools library, where your agent's HTTP tools live.
The Custom Tools library, where your agent's HTTP tools live.

steps.title: Name and Describe It
steps.content:
1. Under Basic Information, give the tool a clear Name (for example lookupAddress or getUserInfo).
  2. Write a plain-English Description of what it does and when it should run.
  3. The AI reads this description to decide when to call the tool - so be specific.

steps.title: Configure the Endpoint
steps.content:
1. Under API Configuration, choose the Request Method (GET or POST).
  2. Enter Your URL - the endpoint on your server that the agent will call.
  3. Define the parameters as a JSON schema. Use the Visual Builder for a simple form, or switch to JSON Code for advanced editing.
  4. Click Test to fire a sample request and confirm your endpoint responds correctly.

steps.title: Optional: Voice Settings
steps.content:
1. Turn on Speaks for Execution to have the agent say a short line (for example "One moment while I check that") while the tool runs.
  2. Turn on Speak After Execution to have it say something once the tool returns.
  3. Click Create Tool to save.

steps.title: Attach It to an Agent
steps.content:
1. Open a Smart Agent from Intelligence Center → Smart Agents.
  2. Open the Tools / MCP panel and add your new tool under Custom.
  3. Test the agent and ask something that should trigger the tool to confirm it fires.

images.caption: Attach your custom tool to an agent in the Tools / MCP panel.
Attach your custom tool to an agent in the Tools / MCP panel.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
